---
title: "Lung Cancer Mortality in Georgia"
subtitle: "Geographic Distribution and Data Overview (2021-2025)"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Overview

This report examines lung cancer mortality patterns across Georgia counties between 2021 and 2025, using simulated data based on CDC mortality statistics.

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(DT)

# Load datasets
georgia_mortality <- read.csv("data/georgia_mortality.csv")
georgia_population <- read.csv("data/georgia_population.csv")

# Load mapping function
source("create_mortality_map.R")
```

## Geographic Distribution

The map below shows lung cancer mortality rates per 100,000 population across Georgia counties. Darker colors indicate higher mortality rates.

```{r}
#| label: map
#| fig-height: 6

create_mortality_map(filter(georgia_mortality, Site == "Lung & Bronchus"), georgia_population)
```

## Data Summary

```{r}
#| label: summary-stats

total_deaths <- sum(filter(georgia_mortality, Site == "Lung & Bronchus")$n)
avg_per_year <- total_deaths / 5
counties_affected <- n_distinct(filter(georgia_mortality, Site == "Lung & Bronchus")$County)
```

- **Total lung cancer deaths (2021-2025):** `r format(total_deaths, big.mark = ",")`
- **Average per year:** `r format(round(avg_per_year), big.mark = ",")`
- **Counties with recorded deaths:** `r counties_affected`

## Detailed Data Table

The table below provides the complete lung cancer mortality dataset, which can be filtered and searched interactively.

```{r}
#| label: data-table

datatable(
  filter(georgia_mortality, Site == "Lung & Bronchus")
)
```

---

*Data source: Simulated based on CDC mortality patterns*
